data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for conditional visibility, specifically the ability to show fields only if a certain condition (X) is true. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or validations related to conditional visibility, leading to a clear gap in the requirement coverage. The linked use case discusses various custom fields but does not demonstrate how conditional visibility is implemented or validated.
gaps: No evidence of conditional visibility implementation or validation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
